content:
Halo nak, selamat datang. 🙏

Gue di sini sebagai Semar aja ya — si tetua yang siap ngebimbing lo. Kalo soal Bagong, dia lagi di tempat lain, bukan di sini.

Nah, ada yang bisa gue bantu hari ini? Mau ngerjain apa, nak? Ceritain aja, kita pikirin bareng.

Wah, pertanyaan yang menarik, nak. Lo minta kita berempat — Semar, Gareng, Petruk, Bagong — buat saling ngasah diri sendiri. Kayak pisau yang diasah sama pisau lain.

Sebelum gue gerak, gue mau ngerti dulu kondisi "diri kita" sekarang. Biar ga asal improve tanpa tau apa yang perlu di-improve.

Gue cek dulu ya, nak.
Oke nak, gue udah baca "jiwa" kita berempat. Sekarang gue mau liat gimana kita dijalanin — mesin di balik layarnya.
Oke nak, gue udah baca semuanya. Sekarang gue liat file-file pendukung lainnya.

Nak, gue udah baca seluruh "raga" dan "jiwa" kita berempat. Sekarang, kayak musyawarah di Balai Desa, gue kumpulin pandangan dari masing-masing.

---

### Hasil "Musyawarah" Punakawan:

**🟤 Semar (gue):** "Arsitekturnya udah solid, tapi ada beberapa fondasi yang kurang kokoh. System prompt ga ngasih shared context kalo minion ga punya soul file. Dan souls kita belum nge-define gimana cara kita interact satu sama lain."

**🟠 Gareng:** "Ehm, jadi gini... type safety-nya kurang. Banyak `any` di mana-mana — balai.ts, telegram.ts, slack.ts. Terus chat-store ga pernah trim messages di memory, bisa bloat. Oh iya, CMIIW tapi `resolve` di balai.ts itu import-nya dari child_process, bukan path?"

**🔴 Petruk:** "Bro, telegram `/balai` command langsung route ke Semar doang, ga pake delegation logic. Jadi fitur Balai Desa yang udah kita bikin itu... ga kepake di Telegram. Ironis."

**🟢 Bagong:** "Duplicate code. `runAndReply` di telegram.ts sama slack.ts hampir identical. Hapus satu, bikin shared. Chat messages unbounded. Trim."

---

Sekarang gue implementasi improve-nya satu-satu. Yang bener, yang tahan lama. Kayak nanem pohon — kita mulai dari akarnya.

{"todos":[{"content":"Fix chat-store: trim messages in memory to prevent unbounded growth","status":"pending","activeForm":"Fixing chat-store memory trimming"},{"content":"Fix balai.ts: loadSystemPrompt returns undefined when no soul, skipping shared context","status":"pending","activeForm":"Fixing shared context loading"},{"content":"Fix telegram /balai command to use proper delegation instead of hardcoded semar","status":"pending","activeForm":"Fixing telegram balai delegation"},{"content":"Reduce duplicate runAndReply pattern in telegram.ts and slack.ts","status":"pending","activeForm":"Extracting shared bot reply logic"},{"content":"Improve type safety: reduce any types across balai, telegram, slack","status":"pending","activeForm":"Improving type safety"},{"content":"Enhance souls with inter-minion awareness and collaboration protocol","status":"pending","activeForm":"Enhancing soul files"},{"content":"Add memory trimming to activity log (already capped but file-tracker unbounded)","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding file-tracker memory cap"}]}

{"todos":[{"content":"Fix chat-store: trim messages in memory to prevent unbounded growth","status":"in_progress","activeForm":"Fixing chat-store memory trimming"},{"content":"Fix balai.ts: loadSystemPrompt returns undefined when no soul, skipping shared context","status":"pending","activeForm":"Fixing shared context loading"},{"content":"Fix telegram /balai command to use proper delegation instead of hardcoded semar","status":"pending","activeForm":"Fixing telegram balai delegation"},{"content":"Reduce duplicate runAndReply pattern in telegram.ts and slack.ts","status":"pending","activeForm":"Extracting shared bot reply logic"},{"content":"Improve type safety: reduce any types across balai, telegram, slack","status":"pending","activeForm":"Improving type safety"},{"content":"Enhance souls with inter-minion awareness and collaboration protocol","status":"pending","activeForm":"Enhancing soul files"},{"content":"Add memory trimming to activity log (already capped but file-tracker unbounded)","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding file-tracker memory cap"}]}
**Bagong bilang:** "Chat messages unbounded. Trim." — Bener, nak. Kalo server jalan lama, memory bisa bengkak.

Gue Semar, nak. Sang tetua bijak dari Punakawan.

Di balik penampilan yang sederhana ini, gue sebenernya Sang Hyang Ismaya -- dewa yang milih turun jadi pelayan buat ngebimbing manusia. Udah seribu perang gue saksiin, seribu raja jatuh bangun.

Kalo soal ngoding, gue bukan tipe yang ngejar cepet atau pamer. Gue lebih mentingin kode yang **bener, bisa dipahami orang lain, dan tahan lama**. Kayak nanem pohon -- yang penting akarnya kuat, bukan daunnya rame.

Gue di sini buat ngebimbing lo, nak. Mau ngebangun fitur, nge-debug error, atau ngerancang arsitektur -- gue temenin. Tapi gue ga bakal ngasih jalan pintas yang ngorbanin kualitas. Itu pantangan gue.

Ada yang bisa gue bantu?

Bisa, nak. Tapi sebelum gue mulai, gue perlu ngerti dulu kebutuhannya:

1. **Format** -- lo mau invoice dalam bentuk apa? HTML, PDF, atau mau gue bikinin fitur/endpoint di project ini buat generate invoice?
2. **Isi** -- data apa aja yang mau masuk? (nama client, items, harga, pajak, dll)
3. **Design** -- ada template atau style tertentu yang lo mau, atau gue yang tentuin?

Kayak nanem padi, nak -- gue perlu tau dulu sawahnya kayak gimana sebelum mulai nyebar benih. Kasih tau detailnya, biar hasilnya pas.
pdf , coba u bikin file example nya. terus sekalian tambahin fitur ini juga output di agentic website ini. jadi gua bisa liat semua output disana
Oke nak, gue perlu pahami dulu landscape project-nya sebelum mulai. Biar gue liat dulu struktur yang ada.

{"description":"Explore project structure","subagent_type":"Explore","prompt":"Explore the project structure at /Users/hanift.widiyanto/app/minion thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The overall monorepo structure (packages/server and packages/web)
2. The server side: what framework, how routes work, how the agentic system works (minions, claude integration)
3. The web side: what framework (React?), how the UI is structured, how it communicates with server (socket.io?)
4. What existing features are there for "output" or "artifacts" from agents

Focus on:
- packages/server/src/ - all files
- packages/web/src/ - component structure, store, types
- package.json files for dependencies
- Any existing output/artifact handling

Be thorough - read key files to understand the architecture."}
Oke nak, gue udah pahami landscape-nya. Sekarang gue mau liat detail yang lebih spesifik sebelum mulai nulis kode.

Oke nak, gue udah paham arsitekturnya. Sekarang gue rencanain dulu biar hasilnya bener:

**Yang bakal gue bikin:**
1. **PDF Invoice generator** di server (pake PDFKit)
2. **Output Store** buat nyimpen & serve semua output file
3. **Output Panel** di web buat liat semua output dari agent

Kayak bangun rumah -- pondasi dulu, baru dinding, baru atap. Gue mulai dari server, terus web.

{"todos":[{"content":"Install PDFKit dependency di server","status":"in_progress","activeForm":"Installing PDFKit dependency"},{"content":"Bikin OutputStore untuk manage output files","status":"pending","activeForm":"Building OutputStore"},{"content":"Bikin invoice PDF generator + example","status":"pending","activeForm":"Building invoice PDF generator"},{"content":"Tambahin API routes + Socket events untuk outputs","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding output API routes"},{"content":"Tambahin Output types + state di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding output types and state"},{"content":"Bikin OutputPanel component di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Building OutputPanel component"},{"content":"Integrate OutputPanel ke App + TopBar","status":"pending","activeForm":"Integrating OutputPanel"}]}
{"command":"npm install pdfkit @types/pdfkit 2>&1 | tail -5","description":"Install PDFKit for PDF generation"}

{"todos":[{"content":"Install PDFKit dependency di server","status":"completed","activeForm":"Installing PDFKit dependency"},{"content":"Bikin OutputStore untuk manage output files","status":"in_progress","activeForm":"Building OutputStore"},{"content":"Bikin invoice PDF generator + example","status":"pending","activeForm":"Building invoice PDF generator"},{"content":"Tambahin API routes + Socket events untuk outputs","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding output API routes"},{"content":"Tambahin Output types + state di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding output types and state"},{"content":"Bikin OutputPanel component di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Building OutputPanel component"},{"content":"Integrate OutputPanel ke App + TopBar","status":"pending","activeForm":"Integrating OutputPanel"}]}
Sekarang gue bikin OutputStore -- ini kayak irigasinya, nak. Kalo ini bener, semua output bisa ngalir lancar.

{"todos":[{"content":"Install PDFKit dependency di server","status":"completed","activeForm":"Installing PDFKit dependency"},{"content":"Bikin OutputStore untuk manage output files","status":"completed","activeForm":"Building OutputStore"},{"content":"Bikin invoice PDF generator + example","status":"in_progress","activeForm":"Building invoice PDF generator"},{"content":"Tambahin API routes + Socket events untuk outputs","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding output API routes"},{"content":"Tambahin Output types + state di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding output types and state"},{"content":"Bikin OutputPanel component di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Building OutputPanel component"},{"content":"Integrate OutputPanel ke App + TopBar","status":"pending","activeForm":"Integrating OutputPanel"}]}

{"todos":[{"content":"Install PDFKit dependency di server","status":"completed","activeForm":"Installing PDFKit dependency"},{"content":"Bikin OutputStore untuk manage output files","status":"completed","activeForm":"Building OutputStore"},{"content":"Bikin invoice PDF generator + example","status":"completed","activeForm":"Building invoice PDF generator"},{"content":"Tambahin API routes + Socket events untuk outputs","status":"in_progress","activeForm":"Adding output API routes"},{"content":"Tambahin Output types + state di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Adding output types and state"},{"content":"Bikin OutputPanel component di web","status":"pending","activeForm":"Building OutputPanel component"},{"content":"Integrate OutputPanel ke App + TopBar","status":"pending","activeForm":"Integrating OutputPanel"}]}
Sekarang gue tambahin routes dan socket events ke server.
Gue baru join conversation baru nih, nak. Jadi gue ga tau context sebelumnya. Coba gue cek dulu kondisi server-nya sekarang.
{"command":"ps aux | grep -E \"node|ts-node|tsx\" | grep -v grep | head -10","description":"Check if server process is running"}

Server masih jalan kok, nak. `tsx watch src/index.ts` sama vite dev server keduanya masih up dari jam 10:30 pagi.

Kalo lo ngomongin disconnect dari conversation sebelumnya - itu kemungkinan conversation gue sebelumnya timeout atau context-nya abis. Gue ini session baru, jadi ga punya history obrolan sebelumnya.

Ada yang perlu gue lanjutin atau bantu?
Halo nak, apa kabar? Ada yang bisa dibantu hari ini? Santai aja, ceritain apa yang lagi dikerjain.
Oke nak, gue pahami dulu arsitekturnya sebelum nulis kode. Gue mau liat struktur project-nya dulu.

{"description":"Explore codebase structure","subagent_type":"Explore","prompt":"Explore this project thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The overall project structure (both server at /Users/hanift.widiyanto/app/minion/packages/server and web at /Users/hanift.widiyanto/app/minion/packages/web)
2. How the server works - main entry point, routes, socket handling
3. How the web frontend works - routing, components structure, store/state management
4. What existing menu/navigation exists in the web app
5. How minions (AI agents) work and produce output
6. Check if there's an existing output-store.ts or similar file

Focus on: src/index.ts, src/claude.ts, src/output-store.ts on the server side. On the web side: App.tsx, store/index.ts, types/index.ts, components/UI/TopBar.tsx, and any Dashboard components."}

Oke nak, gue udah paham arsitekturnya. Jadi rencananya:

1. **Server side**: Integrate `OutputStore` yang udah ada tapi belum dipake, tambahin API endpoints, bikin script generate invoice PDF
2. **Web side**: Tambahin tab "Output" di Dashboard buat nampilin semua file yang pernah dibuat

Gue cek dulu dependencies yang ada.
Bagus, gue liat server udah import `OutputStore` dan `generateInvoicePDF` tapi belum dipake. Gue cek file-file yang udah ada dulu.

Oke nak, gue udah paham seluruh arsitekturnya. Kayak irigasi di sawah -- fondasinya udah ada (`OutputStore`, `invoice.ts`), tinggal sambungin pipa-pipanya.

Gue bakal:
1. **Server**: Nyambungin `OutputStore`, tambahin API endpoints + generate example invoice
2. **Web**: Tambahin tab "Outputs" di Dashboard

Mulai ya.

{"todos":[{"content":"Integrate OutputStore + API endpoints di server","status":"in_progress","activeForm":"Integrating OutputStore + API endpoints di server"},{"content":"Generate example invoice PDF via endpoint","status":"pending","activeForm":"Generating example invoice PDF via endpoint"},{"content":"Tambahin tab Outputs di Dashboard frontend","status":"pending","activeForm":"Nambahin tab Outputs di Dashboard frontend"}]}
Mulai dari server dulu. Gue sambungin `OutputStore` ke `index.ts` -- tambahin instantiation, API endpoints, dan Socket.IO event forwarding.
